handback.subpart: Adapter atom global-fake exception for pumped/no-module-mocks
handback.reason: The parser can identify a global spy target, but no current syntax or repository path convention proves that the test is the adapter atom's own unit test. Allowing global spies in every test weakens AG-11; inventing an adapter path convention or suppression exceeds this PKR.
handback.needed_decision: Fund a narrow DKR or define a human-approved adapter-test path/config contract before changing no-module-mocks
